title: Samyutta Nikaya: The Fire Sermon
description: The Buddha declares everything is burning — with passion, aversion, and delusion. T.S. Eliot quoted this in The Waste Land.
introduction: The Buddha declares everything is burning — with passion, aversion, and delusion. T.S. Eliot quoted this in The Waste Land.

translation.text: Bhikkhus, all is burning. And what is the all that is burning? The eye is burning.
